markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the new content calendar, analytics dashboard, and data strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content OS:** GrowthX launched a \~100-topic Airtable calendar, categorizing topics into clusters (e.g., "Meetings," "Competitive") to target both high-volume keywords and strategic zero-volume terms for brand awareness.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [**Data Strategy:** Talaera will provide raw, anonymized user data (learning reasons, confidence scores) to fuel more impactful content, moving beyond the current 2,000-record sample.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [**CTA Overhaul:** The blog's CTA strategy will be revamped to replace ineffective banner ads with engaging inline graphics and a high-impact sticky banner for core conversions (demos, pricing).](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:** A new Looker dashboard combines GA4 and GSC data, enabling Talaera to isolate and measure the performance of GrowthX-generated content.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Calendar

  - [**New Content OS:** GrowthX launched a \~100-topic Airtable calendar, categorizing topics into clusters to target both high-volume keywords and strategic zero-volume terms for brand awareness.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [**Topic Clusters:**](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [**High-Volume:** "Meetings," "Email," "Presentations"](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [**Strategic:** "Competitive" (e.g., "Talaera vs. Preply")](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Captures users comparing brands, even if direct search volume is low. Content will be factual and highlight Talaera's strengths.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [**Talaera Review Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [Review all topics in the "Pending Review" view.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [Comment on any topics to deprioritize or flag for issues; approval comments are not required.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)

### Data & Statistics Artifact

  - [**Goal:** Use Talaera's internal data to create unique, impactful content.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [**Current Artifact:** A Notion doc with initial data points (e.g., 85% exercise completion rate).](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [**Data Gaps Identified:**](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [Learner breakdown by country/region.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [Skill gaps by job function (e.g., engineers struggle with meetings).](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [Confidence metrics over time (e.g., confidence increase after 6 months).](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [**Talaera Data Availability:**](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
      - [**Confidence Metrics:** Data is available from post-training surveys.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
      - [**Skill Gaps:** A 2,000-record sample exists; a full dataset (\~30k-40k records) is likely available from Anton.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [**Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [Paola will request the full, anonymized dataset from Anton and Mel.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [Anita and Paola will review the raw data before sharing with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)

### CTA Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Drive blog readers to the next conversion step.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [**Problem:** Current banner CTAs are ineffective due to "banner blindness."](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
      - [**Inline CTAs:** Use visually engaging graphics (inspired by Webstacks) for product-specific calls to action.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
      - [**Sticky Banner:** Reserve this prime real estate for the highest-impact CTA (e.g., "Book a Demo," "Start Learning").](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
      - [**End-of-Post CTA:** Use for the most important conversion, as readers who finish an article are highly engaged.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)

### Performance Tracking & Looker Dashboard

  - [**New Dashboard:** A Looker dashboard combining GA4 and GSC data is live.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
      - [**GrowthX Cohort:** Isolate and measure traffic/conversions from GrowthX-generated content.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
      - [**Non-Branded Traffic:** Track organic search for non-branded queries (e.g., "virtual meeting tips").](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
      - [**Conversion Events:** Monitor key events: `sign_up` (B2C free account), `purchase` (B2C), and `managers` (B2B demo booking).](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
      - [**LLM Referrals:** Track traffic from sources like ChatGPT and Perplexity.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)
  - [**Branded Misspellings:**](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1870.0)
      - [**Issue:** Searches for "Talera" (no 'a') rank Talaera 5th, behind another entity.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)
      - [**Context:** Google is generally good at correcting intent, but this specific case is a problem.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1870.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will consult its team for a technical SEO recommendation.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)

### Technical SEO & Rank Math

  - [**Goal:** Maximize blog optimization for ranking in LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)
  - [**Tool:** Talaera uses the Rank Math WordPress plugin, which includes an `llms.txt` file feature.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will consult its technical SEO team on best practices for configuring Rank Math to improve LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
      - [Share AI-generated featured image stock photos (async).](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
      - [Create and share CTA artifacts in Notion for review.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [Consult technical SEO team on Rank Math configuration for LLM optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)
      - [Investigate the "Talera" misspelling ranking issue.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)
  - [**Talaera:**](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [Review the Airtable content calendar and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [Request the full, anonymized user data set (learning reasons, confidence scores) from Anton and Mel.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [Update the publication date on the recently refreshed article.](https://fathom.video/share/tj3rBtXa27yLsQBt_EkxeKsmhyaTUkiT?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
